tool.name: Amazon Q Apps
tool.description: No-code AI app builder delivered as a feature within Amazon Q Business Pro.
tool.pricing: Included in Amazon Q Business Pro.
tool.statusNote: Feature within Q Business Pro, not a standalone product.
tool.logoNotes: Official AWS architecture icon for Amazon Q (`Arch_Amazon-Q_64.svg` from the AWS Architecture Icons pack), intentionally reused because AWS presents these surfaces as Amazon Q variants rather than with separate public per-variant icons.
tool.practitionerNote: Most relevant for lightweight internal app generation inside an existing Amazon Q Business deployment, not as a standalone enterprise app platform.

dataResidency.detail: Inherits Q Business residency; cross-region inference within geography; in-country needs AWS Support.

deployment.detail: Feature within Amazon Q Business Pro; SaaS only; no standalone deployment.

auditLogging.detail: Q Apps API calls logged via CloudTrail.

soc2.detail: Inherits Amazon Q Business SOC 1/2/3 scope.

iso42001.detail: Inherits Amazon Q Business ISO 42001 scope.

euAiAct.detail: Assessed limited-risk by product category; no published vendor EU AI Act conformity assessment.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary feature of Q Business Pro; cannot be used outside Q Business.
